title: Calling Bullshit
author: Carl T. Bergstrom
subline: The art of skepticism in a data-driven world.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A bullseye-style BS Meter: 4 concentric circles. A giant red arrow slashes diagonally through the whole thing, indicating 'rejected'. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none">
    <!-- Concentric circles -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="540" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="430" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="320" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="210" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- Tick marks around the outer ring -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
      <line x1="-540" y1="0" x2="-520" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="540" y1="0" x2="520" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-540" x2="0" y2="-520"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="540" x2="0" y2="520"/>
      <line x1="-382" y1="-382" x2="-368" y2="-368"/>
      <line x1="382" y1="-382" x2="368" y2="-368"/>
      <line x1="-382" y1="382" x2="-368" y2="368"/>
      <line x1="382" y1="382" x2="368" y2="368"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Tiny labels on the rings -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">
      <text x="0" y="-555" text-anchor="middle">PLAUSIBLE</text>
      <text x="0" y="555" text-anchor="middle">LIKELY BS</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A giant red diagonal slash through the whole thing -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="-700" x2="700" y2="700" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="6"/>
    <!-- The bullseye center dot — RED -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="18" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Bullshit detection IS a target. A literal 5-ring bullseye dominates the top 2/3, with tick marks at the cardinal points and labels 'PLAUSIBLE' at the top, 'LIKELY BS' at the bottom. A massive RED 6px diagonal slash cuts across the entire thing — the universal 'no' / 'rejected' mark. The center bullseye is a red dot. Title sits in the middle, weight 500 command, UPPERCASE. Brand 'BS METER' in the top-left; pill 'FAKE' at the top — the verdict.
